pi_items.source: Drupal field naming convention (field_* prefix) is standard practice. Confirmed in task.json description and setup scripts.

Product SKU defined in setup_task.sh and used in Drupal Commerce environment. While not an official Sony SKU (actual product code is WH-1000XM5 or variants like WH1000XM5/B), this is a valid custom SKU for the Drupal database context.

Official Sony Help Guide (helpguide.sony.net) lists customer support websites by region. For US/Americas, it directs to sony.com/am/support, not sony.com/electronics/support. The /electronics/support URL pattern exists on regional Sony sites (sony.ca, sony.co.uk, sony.com.au, sony-mea.com, sony-latin.com) but not on sony.com itself. Web search queries with sony.com/electronics/support return only regional results. No evidence found that sony.com uses this URL structure.
Text value specified in task.json description (step 6). No external verification needed as this is a custom label for the Drupal task.

privileged_info_summary: The task implements a Drupal Commerce product documentation field with machine name field_user_manual on a product with custom SKU SONY-WH1000XM5 representing Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. The product has a real specifications page at helpguide.sony.net/mdr/wh1000xm5 with product code 5-035-396-11(6) and 250g weight. The task specifies an expected URL for the user manual link as sony.com/electronics/support/wireless-headphones-bluetooth-headphones/wh-1000xm5/manuals with link text 'Official PDF Manual'. However, this specific URL does not appear to exist on sony.com; regional Sony sites (Canada, UK, Australia, Middle East, Latin America) use similar /electronics/support URL patterns for this product, but the official Help Guide directs US customers to sony.com/am/support for support documentation.
